metaTitle: Jiasheng Zhang | AI & Blockchain Infrastructure Engineer

ui.headerSubline: AI · Blockchain · Agent Systems · Cross-chain Infra
ui.featuredIntro: These are the projects that best represent where my work is headed now: contract intelligence, multi-agent execution, multi-chain systems, and production-grade infrastructure.
ui.archiveIntro: A compact index of earlier systems and experiments so nothing important is hidden. This section intentionally includes the legacy AI and computer-vision work as well.
ui.experienceIntro: Before focusing more deeply on blockchain and agent infrastructure, I spent years delivering production AI systems where deployment quality mattered as much as model quality.

profile.name: Jiasheng Zhang
profile.headline: Senior AI & Blockchain Infrastructure Engineer
profile.summary: I build agentic contract systems, multi-chain security pipelines, and developer tools that connect LLM orchestration with real execution layers.
profile.experience: 8 years across AI systems, backend delivery, and applied automation
profile.availability: Best fit for senior IC or founding-engineer roles covering AI infra, blockchain security, contract automation, cross-chain systems, and developer platforms.
profile.currentFocus: AI x blockchain x heterogeneous-chain infrastructure

metrics.label: parallel audit topology shipped in AlphaContract AI
merged contract-risk outputs in one structured report
reusable smart-contract capabilities mapped in modular flows
target runtimes in my current omni-chain design direction

workAuthorization.title: Comfortable with relocation and employer-sponsored visas for Singapore, the US, the EU, the UK, and Canada.

highlights: Translate ambiguous product asks into low-level technical execution plans quickly.
Comfortable switching between protocol logic, AI orchestration, backend services, and UI-facing product flows.
Prefer measurable delivery: latency, success rate, memory footprint, failure visibility, and operator ergonomics.
Operate well in messy R&D environments where the architecture is still moving.

featuredProjects.name: OmniChain Contract Intelligence Studio
featuredProjects.summary: Designed a frontier product direction that converts business intent into deployable contract systems across EVM and Solana, with Node.js orchestration and heterogeneous-chain adapters.

metrics.label: starting point from modular contract playbooks
EVM building blocks available for composition
execution runtimes modeled in one workflow

details: Started from the modular-contract scene engine and unified token launch, whitelist, fee split, bridge, and governance flows into one intent-driven architecture.
Extended the design beyond pure EVM by defining Solana program templates, account-model aware validation, and runtime-specific execution planners for transactions versus instructions.
Planned a Node.js orchestration layer for wallet session handling, chain capability registry, async job processing, event streaming, and operator dashboards.
Built the chain abstraction around JSON-RPC, explorer APIs, bridge relayers, and indexer feeds so the same workflow can target Ethereum, Base, Optimism, Arbitrum, Polygon, and Solana.
Added preflight simulation, fee estimation, bridge-path selection, and policy guardrails so the system can choose native OP routes versus generic bridge routes before deployment.
featuredProjects.achievement: Turned a modular-contract knowledge base into a product-grade omni-chain design direction that stays understandable to product teams while still respecting low-level runtime constraints.

featuredProjects.name: AlphaContract AI Multi-Agent Audit Platform
featuredProjects.summary: Built a Go-based contract security platform that retrieves source code, runs parallel LLM audits, and returns structured risk findings across multiple EVM chains.
details: Split the platform into gateway, code retrieval, and audit microservices, using Redis, Kafka, and an ants worker pool to decouple request intake from asynchronous LLM execution.
Reworked contract analysis into 6 parallel agent groups covering admin controls, taxes, trading restrictions, blacklist logic, anti-whale rules, and scam signals with structured JSON merges.
Normalized multi-chain contract source retrieval against Etherscan-family APIs and cached parsed source data to stabilize repeated analysis flows.
Closed observability gaps in request tracking and monitoring, expanded the event window to 10,000 lines, and made stage-level failure reasons visible to operations.
Introduced per-state Redis TTL policies and retry-aware lifecycle rules so stale tasks no longer accumulated indefinitely in long-running environments.
featuredProjects.achievement: Reached 83% completion in 100-address batch tests with average 10-12 second processing, while cutting projected 30-day Redis memory usage from 5.37GB to 378MB.

featuredProjects.name: Air Spring Quality Inspection System
featuredProjects.summary: Delivered a high-precision inspection system for air spring bellows, combining industrial imaging, multilayer reinforcement-cord analysis, and PLC-linked production control.
details: Built a multilayer inspection pipeline that validated inner layer, outer layer, and inter-layer spacing under industrial lighting constraints.
Optimized image processing for ultra-high-definition camera input while keeping throughput usable for factory operations.
Connected model outputs to industrial PLC control so defects could directly drive downstream production actions.
Made the system robust enough for sustained deployment instead of one-off lab demos.
featuredProjects.achievement: Reached 99.5% detection accuracy with zero false negatives in the production environment.

featuredProjects.name: Monocular Distance Measurement System
featuredProjects.summary: Built a safety-critical insulator monitoring system that evolved from direct pixel mapping into NeRF-based single-view 3D scene understanding for electrical worker safety.

metrics.label: reported after deployment in covered stations
warning workflow delivered to field use

details: Moved the system from simple pixel-to-physical heuristics to a more advanced NeRF-based scene-reconstruction approach.
Used single-view imagery to recover scene structure and improve distance estimation reliability under varied conditions.
Built a mobile-friendly warning flow so field workers could receive danger alerts in time-sensitive environments.
Focused on reliability and robustness because false judgement in this domain directly affects worker safety.
featuredProjects.achievement: Deployed in multiple power stations with zero electrical-injury incidents reported in covered workflows.

projectArchive.name: Agentic Collaboration System
projectArchive.summary: Built a multi-agent AI system that separated planning, memory, retrieval, and execution responsibilities to improve specialization and stability.
projectArchive.achievement: Created reusable agent design patterns that later fed directly into contract-security and smart-contract configuration workflows.

projectArchive.name: Virtual Home Classroom
projectArchive.summary: Designed a digital human teacher concept using Unreal Engine 5 and fine-tuned LLaMA 3 to create adaptive home learning flows.
projectArchive.achievement: Validated the learning concept with early student testing and positive feedback on adaptive pacing.

projectArchive.name: Brain-Computer Interface Data Processing Platform
projectArchive.summary: Architected a brain-signal processing pipeline with reinforcement-learning-based classification, a Flask + Vue interface, and containerized deployment.
projectArchive.achievement: Improved signal-processing accuracy by 40% and reduced latency by 50%.

projectArchive.name: LLM Model Optimization Project
projectArchive.summary: Worked on GPTQ quantization, LoRA fine-tuning, and distributed inference design to reduce deployment cost while improving serving speed.
projectArchive.achievement: Reduced deployment costs by 60% and increased inference speed by 3x.

projectArchive.name: Other Vision Project Showcase
projectArchive.summary: A compact collection of additional work spanning action recognition, skin detection, sports capture, and real-time visual processing.
projectArchive.achievement: Shows the breadth of earlier CV work across demos, evaluation flows, and production-style experimentation.

previousWork.title: AI Research Engineer
responsibilities: Delivered computer-vision systems for sports performance analysis using OpenCV, detection pipelines, and deployment-ready model workflows.
Worked on segmentation and motion-understanding tasks where real-world robustness mattered more than demo-only metrics.
Built repeatable deployment processes and collaborated closely with domain users to make the systems operational.

previousWork.title: Senior AI Engineer
responsibilities: Led AI-heavy education product work covering computer vision, deep-learning interaction flows, and real-time content understanding.
Built scalable backends and model-serving components for interactive educational scenarios with tight latency and reliability constraints.
Mentored junior engineers and coordinated delivery across product, algorithm, and implementation teams.
